productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Solid Navy Blue Polo TShirt
description: Composition Navy blue and red striped polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a short collar with a buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, embroidered club badge on the left chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Designed for the sporty minded, this striped polo neck T-shirt from locomotive celebrates the sporty spirit of the Sailors Union of Santa Monica Bay. Crafted from super soft cotton, this T-shirt offers exemplary comfort, while you flaunt your well-toned muscles in style with the ribbed sleeve hems. Pair it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
